name: cepien-insight
description: Fetch Cepien AI product insights and route top-impact recommendations into LunaOS workflows — downstream execution for Cepien's agentic product discovery.
author: LunaOS

tools.name: cepien-client
tools.description: Call Cepien REST API — list insights, fetch recommendation detail, trigger discovery run

tools.name: impact-filter
tools.description: Filter Cepien recommendations by impact score thresholds (business, product, usability)

tools.name: workflow-dispatcher
tools.description: Route approved recommendations into LunaOS workflows for execution

project_id.description: Cepien project ID to pull insights from

min_impact_score.description: Minimum combined impact score (0-100) to include a recommendation

impact_dimension.description: Which impact axis to filter on

limit.description: Max recommendations to return per run

target_workflow_id.description: LunaOS workflow ID to trigger per recommendation (when destination=workflow)

auto_trigger.description: Auto-trigger workflow per recommendation (else return list for manual approval)

recommendations.description: Filtered recommendations with impact scores, source data, and proposed actions

dispatched_runs.description: LunaOS workflow run IDs triggered per recommendation (when auto_trigger=true)

summary.description: Totals: fetched, filtered, dispatched, skipped with reasons
